Action: Ensure SUT is registered and connectors are Available
Expected Result: SUT is ready for charging session

Action: EV driver plugs cable into the connector
SUT detects plug event and updates connector status
EV driver presents RFID/IdTag for authorization
SUT sends Authorize request to CSMS
Expected Result: Authorize request sent with the presented IdTag

Action: SUT locks the connector (if applicable) and starts transaction
Expected Result: StartTransaction request sent with initial meter value

Action: SUT updates connector status to Charging
